preflight_checks.name: ollama_http_health
preflight_checks.expected: returns JSON with available Ollama models

preflight_checks.name: ollama_model_list
preflight_checks.expected: includes nomic-embed-text or the model set in OLLAMA_EMBEDDING_MODEL

preflight_checks.name: python_import_path
preflight_checks.expected: prints the repo embeddings directory without import errors

clean_reindex_commands.name: verify_vector_count
clean_reindex_commands.command:
@'
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('data/embeddings/personal-data-protection-act-2010.smoke.vectors.jsonl')
print(sum(1 for line in path.open('r', encoding='utf-8') if line.strip()))
'@ | .\venv_new\Scripts\python.exe -

clean_reindex_commands.name: spot_check_embedding_dimensions
clean_reindex_commands.command:
@'
import json
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('data/embeddings/personal-data-protection-act-2010.smoke.vectors.jsonl')
rows = [json.loads(line) for line in path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines()[:5]]
print(sorted({len(row['embedding']) for row in rows}))
print(len({tuple(row['embedding']) for row in rows}))
'@ | .\venv_new\Scripts\python.exe -
clean_reindex_commands.expected_output: dimension much larger than 3, and more than 1 unique embedding in the first five rows

notes: The quarantined artifact was diagnosed as non-real fallback/test output rather than a bug in the current embedder, indexing script, or vector-store writer.
If live Ollama remains unavailable, do not regenerate vectors using test transports or fallback embeddings.
A clean reindex will only cover processed files with a .jsonl extension under data/processed.
